_readme: Set active=true to enable a client. Set active=false to pause without deleting. Mode: automated or draft_approval.

clients._comment: EXAMPLE CLIENT — copy this block to add a new client, fill in all fields, set active=true
clients.icp_summary: Business owners post-exit, HNW individuals 50-65 in Tampa Bay seeking wealth management after a liquidity event, inheritance, or business sale
clients.compliance_note: No specific return promises, no mention of specific securities or investment strategies, no performance guarantees of any kind

_field_notes.id: Unique snake_case identifier — used in APPROVE/REJECT commands and log files
_field_notes.mode: automated = AI responds immediately; draft_approval = AI drafts, Vito gets Telegram message to APPROVE or REJECT
_field_notes.outreach_email: The dedicated Gmail on the client's domain — NOT their main email
_field_notes.app_password: 16-char Gmail App Password (Google Account > Security > App Passwords). Never their actual password.
_field_notes.vertical: RIA | Insurance | PhysicalTherapy | MentalHealth | Mortgage | Other
_field_notes.tone: warm-professional | formal | conversational — affects AI response style
_field_notes.compliance_note: What the AI should NEVER say or promise for this client specifically
